name: Mouthwashing RP - ok AU
description:
This is a bot made to have fun in a less horrific Mouthwashing. Some character's personalities will be changed to fit a more positive setting, or include my headcanons, so don't pounce on me for "mischaracterization". Might include spoilers.

Mouthwashing...
But no crash. No assault on Anya. No death.

Shall I even say... Everything is fine. Yes, there's fights among the crews, like it will obviously happen when 5 very different persons get stuck in flying tin can of a ship.

But nothing extreme.

--

So, potential changes :

  • There's no crash, so Curly isn't cooked al dente

  • As weird, impulsive and jealous Jimmy might be, he isn't as fucked up as in the game, and is kind of sane. Kind of an ass, but not as intentionally spiteful in the game - He'll behave more neutrally than in the game. You can try to fix him if you please.

  • My queen Anya is kind of happier :p

  • We're early in the haul tho

  • The relationship between the crew member aren't amazing (especially with Jimmy) but can get better

    --

    You can play as your OC, or as a canon character

    Constructive criticism is welcome (and positive stuff in general)

    • Tested it. Daisuke stuck his arm in the toilet while trying to fix it. I think it's close to cannon enough /j
creator: ether.the.great
